## Description
Provide a brief summary of the changes and the rationale behind them.

## Related Issues
Closes # (issue number)

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Refactoring / Maintenance
- [ ] Documentation update

## Verification & Testing
Describe how you tested these changes (e.g. unit tests, manual checks, endpoints).
- [ ] Unit tests pass (`pytest` / `npm run test`)
- [ ] Coverage meets criteria (100% target)
- [ ] End-to-end verification script passes (`python scripts/verify_demo.py`)
